stemHtml: From FL50 to 500 ft above the destination aerodrome, a multi-engined piston (MEP) aeroplane performs a steady descent, maintaining a constant speed of 120 kt IAS. During this descent, the ‘’Power Required vs. TAS’’ curve will move (1) _____ and the ‘’Power Available vs. TAS’’ curve will move (2) _____.

options.a: (1) up and right; (2) down and right
options.b: (1) down and right; (2) up and right
options.c: (1) up and left; (2) down and left
options.d: (1) down and left; (2) up and left
